title: ternstroemia cleyera
intro: Ternstroemia cleyera, also known as the Chinese lantern or wild cleyera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ternstroemiaceae. Traditionally used in Asian medicine, Ternstroemia cleyera has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Ternstroemia cleyera can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
